caption: A nighttime scene is captured from an indoor perspective looking out through a doorway or window onto a dark patio or yard. In the foreground, a white ledge holds a couple of white planters and a dark gray pot. A ladder leans against a wall in the background. As the sequence progresses, the camera pans slightly, shifting the perspective of the outdoor area. A person, partially visible and mostly obscured by the darkness, appears to be moving near the outdoor ledge. In the final frames, a hand or arm enters the view near the planters, and a small, metallic-looking object is seen resting on the ledge. The lighting is dim and grainy, characteristic of low-light surveillance or handheld footage, with no text or logos visible on screen.
